*355 brands total* (+0 today)
97.2% have complete profiles (description + image)

*:warning: Possible Broken (2)*
• `BoingBoing` (<https://www.boing.com.tw|boing.com.tw>) — live but only indexed under HTTP; HTTPS / TLS may not be configured
• `MissMe 繆思蜜` (<https://www.missme.com.tw|missme.com.tw>) — homepage shows correct brand but sub-pages serve different content (deodorizing products); possible domain reuse or multi-tenant platform

*:question: Unknown / Unverified (3)*
• `Journey of Sole` (<https://journeyofsole.com|journeyofsole.com>) — no pages indexed in search results
• `MONOCEAN` (<https://monocean.co|monocean.co>) — .co domain not indexed; unrelated .com domain listed for sale
• `RAFAC` (<https://rafac.com.tw|rafac.com.tw>) — single HTTP-only result; very limited web presence

*:rotating_light: Suspicious — Third-party (1)*
• `暖木家居 Warmwood Living` — URL is <https://www.threads.net/@warmwood.living|threads.net/@warmwood.living> (Threads social media profile, not a brand website)

*DB Health*
Top tables: `brands` (9.4 MB), `storage.objects` (5.3 MB), `brand_search_results` (3.7 MB)
Connections: 1 active / 8 idle / 0 idle-in-txn :white_check_mark:
Dead tuples: :warning: 5 tables need VACUUM — `brand_field_state` (26%), `profiles` (614%), `brand_submissions` (1600%), `brand_saves` (2400%), `newsletter_subscribers` (4400%)
Slow queries: Top entries are VACUUM ops + Supabase-internal — no user-facing slowness :white_check_mark:
